---
id: send-otp-to-email
title: "Send OTP to email"
description: "Sends a 6-digit verification code to the user's email address for registration or password reset."

  as={"h1"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/user/auth/send-otp"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sends a 6-digit verification code to the user's email address for registration or password reset.
